name: prisma-ltree-extension
description: Monorepo for prisma-ltree — a Prisma Next extension pack for PostgreSQL's ltree hierarchical-tree data type.

scripts.ready: vp run --filter ./packages/extension-ltree check-pins && vp run --filter ./packages/extension-ltree build && vp check packages/extension-ltree && vp run --filter ./packages/extension-ltree test
